text: Draft a 10-slide investor pitch-deck OUTLINE for ONE TEN LAB — an AI-accelerated creative studio/lab that builds cinematic content + websites + original music for small brands, niche by niche. Save it as tasks/T-026/PITCH-DECK.md. Cover, one slide each: 1) Problem 2) Solution 3) Product + live demos (reference oneten-studio.vercel.app, the cafe spec sites, the custom-jingle engine) 4) Why now 5) Market 6) Business model (free 7-day spec -> $9.99/mo + add-ons) 7) Traction so far 8) Go-to-market (automated local-SMB outreach + IG DMs) 9) Team 10) The ask. Keep each slide to a tight headline + 2-4 bullets. IMPORTANT: git add the file, commit as [Karen], and PUSH to origin — if the push is rejected, run `git pull --rebase origin main` then push again (retry up to 3x). Then warroom-say one line.
